message:
fix(inspect): properly handle nested structures in Inspect renderable (bd-1bt2)

The Inspect renderable was flattening nested structures, showing nested
field names as if they were top-level fields. This made the output
impossible to understand for complex nested data.

Changes:
- Modified extract_simple_struct_fields to only extract truly top-level
  fields (exactly 4 spaces indentation, not more)
- Skip lines that are part of nested structures (more than 4 spaces)
- Collapse multi-line arrays/structs as [...] or {...} for cleaner display
- Track nesting depth to properly handle multi-line values

Added test: test_extract_simple_struct_fields_array_of_structs to prevent
regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
